aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence but lacks critical elements for AEO readiness, such as structured data, comprehensive content, and customer reviews.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business.
Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local SEO.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, benefits, and keyword-rich information.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a title and some service information but lacks depth and optimization for Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged GBP features, such as posts, Q&A, and detailed service listings, which are crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No active GBP listing or integration with the website.
Lack of detailed service information and keywords related to HVAC and insulation services.
No customer reviews or engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) on the website but lacks citations across major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Monitor and manage online citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and comprehensive content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search queries HVAC and insulation services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing schema markup and expanding service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building a strong GBP presence and earning customer reviews to establish credibility and improve search rankings.

business_name: Energy Saver Solutions Inc - HVAC & Insulation W Seattle
